hero.name: Tomasz Sosnowski
hero.tagline: I design and deploy AI automation systems — from architecture to production.

about.title: About me
about.bio: Solo IT in an e-commerce company — I design, build and deploy automation systems end-to-end, from marketplace integrations to AI agents. Outside work I build my own projects: exoplanet detection ML pipelines, NBA game predictors, AI email agents. I care more about understanding the problem than knowing the ready-made solution.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: I'm always happy to discuss collaboration or interesting projects.
